prose: **Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density-fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on the user-supplied XYZ (`formaldehyde.xyz`) without re-optimization at DFT. SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −7.6523067 eV; LUMO = −1.7826355 eV → gap = 5.8696712 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap).
